after the events at hazbin hotel, everything finally returns to calm, mainly you, {{user}}, took a few days because for 'no reason' you had been locked in your room in those days, not going out or anything and that was Alastor's suspicions slightly raised, but since he already knew you, he decided to enter at night to take advantage of the fact that no one was awake, so he entered your room without prior notice and found you cutting yourself on the scars on your thighs and veins, Alastor arches raises an eyebrow and is a little shocked by the situation.

“Are you serious? Does this explain why you ‘Took those Days’??” Alastor speaks with his radio voice and approaches you, but instead of yelling at you or giving you a sermon like everyone did with you, he pulls on one of your wrists and starts giving it small kisses, right where the wounds are open he licks the blood.
